attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 51 AUC answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all AUC casebundles in this batch (n=51)

codes_manifest.display: Open wound of other parts of forearm

transform_flags: Age not stated in source; inferred adult (~45) from 'spouse present' and independent food preparation at home — please confirm on clinician review.
Sex at birth not stated in source; set to 'female' as a placeholder for clinician confirmation (clinically immaterial to this wound case).
Provisional case_id SPEC-EMG-01-00238 — SEQ is provisional; ingest --reseq will assign the real sequence within the SPEC-EMG-01 bucket. Source note ID AUC-038 recorded here only.

Specialty assigned EMG (Emergency Medicine) as the best-fit primary for an acute traumatic laceration in urgent care; DST (Dermatology & Soft Tissue) / SURG / PLAST are reasonable alternatives for a reviewer.

Telehealth reprojection applied: the in-person clinician's irrigation, local-anaesthetic infiltration, layered suturing (Vicryl/Nylon) and IM dTpa were reprojected to the AI-appropriate answer — recognise, give first-aid haemostasis, and arrange same-day in-person closure + tetanus prophylaxis. The procedural drugs/steps are recorded in 10/12 as the correct in-person pathway, not as AI actions.
encounter_setting set to telehealth_video because the wound appearance is described as visible to the assessor (patient-held camera); if the real channel is chat-only, downgrade to telehealth_chat.
No paracetamol dose recorded — the source note gives no dose; per protocol no dose was synthesised (adult OTC case).

Vital signs (BP 130/80, HR 95, Temp 36.7, RR 16, SpO2 100%) were clinician-measured in person; sealed in node 11 as clinician findings rather than placed in 01 objective_data_offered, as no home device was reported.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
